## Validation

- [ ] `cargo fmt --check`
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings`
- [ ] `cargo test`
- [ ] `cargo run -p reposcryer-cli -- index examples/sample-rust-project`

## Boundaries

- [ ] No fabricated `CALLS` edges
- [ ] No RAG / MCP / Web UI / Tantivy / SQLite added outside the approved phase
